161,947,813,947,813,985,161,985,5.3. FFDNet is Robust Across Languages/Domains
161,996,817,996,817,1031,161,1031,Building on the language and domain analysis from Sec-
161,1031,817,1031,817,1063,161,1063,tion 3 , we can compare the performance per-language and
161,1063,295,1063,295,1098,161,1098,per-domain.
195,1098,817,1098,817,1130,195,1130,Both sizes of FFDNet have similar performance across
161,1130,817,1130,817,1163,161,1163,9 of the 10 most common languages, though they suffer
161,1163,817,1163,817,1197,161,1197,from degraded performance in Russian. FFDNet-S has a
161,1197,817,1197,817,1229,161,1229,higher variance across languages, as the network is likely
161,1229,817,1229,817,1264,161,1264,not equipped with enough parameters to faithfully capture
161,1262,535,1262,535,1296,161,1296,textual signals across languages.
555,1262,817,1262,817,1296,555,1296,Similarly, both models
161,1296,817,1296,817,1329,161,1329,perform conssitently across domains, with FFDNet-S hav-
161,1329,669,1329,669,1363,161,1363,ing a slightly higher variance than FFDNet-L.
161,1380,664,1380,664,1420,161,1420,5.4. Filtering Improves Data Efﬁciency
161,1432,817,1432,817,1464,161,1464,C OMMON F ORMS employs an aggressive ﬁltering strategy
161,1464,817,1464,817,1499,161,1499,to maximize the likelihood that pages in the dataset are
161,1499,817,1499,817,1531,161,1531,well-prepared forms. However, this is done at the cost of
161,1531,817,1531,817,1564,161,1564,potentially more usable data ending up in the training set.
161,1564,817,1564,817,1598,161,1598,To evaluate this trade-off, we train a 6 million parameter
161,1598,817,1598,817,1630,161,1630,FFDNet model on 10k form pages drawn from the ﬁltered
161,1630,817,1630,817,1665,161,1665,set of forms (59k documents), and the same model on 10k
161,1663,817,1663,817,1697,161,1697,form pages drawn from the set of all forms (760k docu-
161,1697,817,1697,817,1745,161,1745,ments). The mAP 50 − 95 when measured on the test set
